description: Execute anonymous Apex, retrieve Apex logs, and manage trace flags
apexLog.configuration.title: Salesforce Apex Log
apexLog.configuration.logPollIntervalSec: Polling interval in seconds for auto-collecting Apex debug logs when trace flags are active. Set to -1 to disable auto-collection.
apexLog.configuration.traceFlagsDefaultD: Default duration in minutes for newly created trace flags.
apexLog.command.executeDocument: SFDX: Execute Anonymous Apex with Currently Open Editor
apexLog.command.executeSelection: SFDX: Execute Anonymous Apex with Editor's Selected Text
apexLog.command.traceFlagsCreateForCurre: SFDX: Create Trace Flag for Current User
apexLog.command.traceFlagsDeleteForCurre: SFDX: Turn Off Trace Flag for Current User
apexLog.command.traceFlagsCreateForUser: SFDX: Create Trace Flag for Another User
